main.availability: Open to Full Stack roles and remote projects
main.pitch: I build fast, scalable web applications with polished user experiences. I combine React, Next.js, Node.js and product thinking to ship ideas with solid technical judgment.
main.roleDetail: Strong frontend, reliable backend and visual judgment for modern products.

about.summary: I'm Gio Vazquez, a Full Stack Developer based in Tijuana. I focus on modern interfaces, robust APIs and flows that help teams and users move with less friction.

developer.title: Full Stack
developer.desc: Scalable web apps, APIs and production-ready architecture.
developer.details: I work with JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, Nest.js, GraphQL and databases. I care about maintainable code, useful documentation and solving problems with real business impact.

uiux.title: UI/UX
uiux.desc: Intuitive, accessible interfaces designed for daily use.
uiux.details: I collaborate well with design and product teams: turning wireframes into responsive experiences, taking care of states, microinteractions, visual consistency and accessibility.

designer.title: Visual
designer.desc: Visual judgment that turns functional software into memorable product.
designer.details: My graphic design background helps me build interfaces with hierarchy, rhythm and clarity. I do not just implement screens: I make the product feel trustworthy, modern and easy to use.

companyGlobal.name: G-Global
companyGlobal.details1: WMS: built modules, CRUD flows and service refactors in a microservices architecture using React, Node.js, TypeScript, MoleculerJS and MongoDB.
companyGlobal.details2: Globalization: shipped features with React, Next.js, TypeScript, GraphQL and Nest.js, including APIs, unit testing and database work.

companyGroup.name: JD Group
companyGroup.details1: Contributed to a platform redesign by building the side navigation, administrative views and dashboards to improve internal workflows.

experience.title: Work experience
experience.description: I have worked on real business systems: logistics, dashboards, microservices, APIs and web products that need stability, clarity and speed.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Technologies and strengths I use to deliver complete products, from interface to service and data integrations.

webDesign.title: Web Design
webDesign.description: UI/UX, responsive design, wireframing, research and visual systems.

frontend.title: Frontend
frontend.description: JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js, CSS, MUI, Tailwind and Astro.

backend.title: Backend
backend.description: Node.js, Nest.js, Express, GraphQL, MongoDB, MySQL and SQL Server.

softSkills.title: Collaboration
softSkills.description: Clear communication, ownership, teamwork, leadership and commitment.

tools.title: Tools
tools.description: Figma, Git, npm, Postman, ESLint, Jira, Trello and agile workflows.

platforms.title: Platforms
platforms.description: Vercel, Firebase, Supabase, Railway, S3 and web deployments.

languages.title: Languages
languages.description: Native Spanish and professional English for documentation and collaboration.

extra.title: Process
extra.description: Scrum, Kanban, testing, documentation and continuous improvement.

contactSection.description: I'm open to Full Stack opportunities, advanced frontend work and projects where technical and visual detail matters.

footer.description: JavaScript/TypeScript Full Stack Developer currently based in Tijuana, Baja California.
